International Higher School of Medicine (IHSM), Kyrgyzstan

Bishkek, Kyrgyzstan is home to ‘The International Higher School of Medicine’ (IHSM), an elite medical university established in 2003.

# Kyrgyzstan

International Higher School of Medicine (IHSM), Kyrgyzstan

Bishkek, Kyrgyzstan is home to ‘The International Higher School of Medicine’ (IHSM), an elite medical university established in 2003. Known for their provision of high quality medical education at low costs, the university was built to help aspiring doctors gain all the necessary skills and knowledge needed to flourish in their medical career. The students learn through a balanced approach of classroom teaching supplemented with active clinical practice. IHSM is accredited globally with institutions such as the World Health Organization (WHO), allowing their graduates to work anywhere in the world.

Additionally, students at IHSM are provided with modern hostel amenities to help them integrate with the vibrant campus life. Students can further strengthen their academic knowledge by taking part in clinical rotations, which allow them to experience the real world applications of medicine. The prominent feature which attracts students from around the globe is the relatively inexpensive tuition fees. With a globally acknowledged degree and a diverse student body, IHSM is irrefutably one of the best medical schools.

Quick Highlights About International Higher School of Medicine (IHSM), Kyrgyzstan

Year of Establishment2003
RecognitionNMC and WHO approved
EligibilityStudents should get 50% aggregate in PCB(Physics, Chemistry and Biology)
Course Duration6 Years

Medium of TeachingEnglish

Why Choose International Higher School of Medicine (IHSM), Kyrgyzstan?

If you need to be more convinced for studying abroad, you may also consider the offerings of the International Higher School of Medicine (IHSM). Here are some of the main benefits:

Low tuition Cost

Medical courses at IHSM are affordable, which helps strengthen their vision of education being free to students from all socio-economic environments and barriers.

Degree with international recognition

Their affiliation with different medical institutions helps pursuing a degree at this university give immediate respect to the holder’s qualifications on a global scale.

Real-life clinical practice

At IHSM, teaching is geared towards effective clinical practice. This is done through ICUs, emergency rooms, and other medical environments which are crucial for training a competent practitioner.

Multi-National Community

Students from all over the globe greatly appreciate the opportunity to study in the hospitable region, thus further broadening regional perspectives and skill sets.

New Technologies

Comfortable hostels with Wi-Fi, laundry, and common rooms further strengthens a student’s experience while studying in IHSM.

Active Student Life

In addition to education, IHSM encourages sports activities, cultural events, and student clubs encouraging orderly development of students which in turn helps foster a comprehensive education.

Selecting IHSM for your medical studies allows immersion into a supportive environment that is diverse and gives a hands-on approach. IHSM greatly enhances your journey towards becoming a professional doctor through their facilities and vibrant campus life. In addition, they also make sure that the whole experience is educational and enjoyable.

Fee Structure of International Higher School of Medicine (IHSM), Kyrgyzstan

Year of Establishment2003
RecognitionNMC and WHO approved
EligibilityStudents should get 50% aggregate in PCB(Physics, Chemistry and Biology)
Course Duration6 Years
NEETQualifying Marks
IELTS/TOFELNot Required
Medium of TeachingEnglish

Let us consider the following aspects of the fee structure for the International Higher School of Medicine.

Each year study fee

For each year of studying, the fee is $5000 (roughly ₹417,000).

Fee for the whole course of 6 years

The total amount for the entire duration of the course of MBBS that spans for six years would be $30,000 (roughly ₹2,502,000).

Fees in relation to currency

The amount is in US Dollars and the rough rate is 1 USD = ₹83.37.

The fees covers the cost of education, but dormitory services, meals, and other self-services are to be paid for separately.

Hostel Facilities At International Higher School of Medicine (IHSM), Kyrgyzstan

Here are the hostel facilities available at International Higher School of Medicine (IHSM):

Accommodation Options

In the hostels, students are offered various room types in accordance with comfort requirements and budgetary limits.

Security

The safety of students is taken care of as the hostels have round-the-clock security.

Wi-Fi

Students are provided with unlimited WI-FI for academic and personal work free of charge.

Laundry Facilities

Working students are assisted in their daily chores through the provision of laundry facilities.

Separate Hostels for Boys and Girls

Privacy and comfort of male and female students is guaranteed by the provision of separate hostels.

Common Areas

Students can study and interact with their peers in addition to having a place where they can relax with their friends.

This facility was meant to help students live comfortably at IHSM, making the time spent at school easier and more pleasant.

Student life At International Higher School of Medicine (IHSM), Kyrgyzstan

Everything at the International Higher School of Medicine (IHSM) revolves around students, be it for academics or in their free time. Here is a brief overview of what to expect IHSM:

Freshers include groups of over 50 students from across the globe.

IHSM students hail from over 50 countries which fosters a learning environment for everyone as they will have a chance to understand and appreciate different cultures and values.

District social activities

The university also has a variety of clubs and associations like sports, cultural societies, student’s council, and volunteer organizations which aids you in breaking the monotony of studies by pursuing personal interests.

Social Events

A number of social events like parties, concerts, and other cultural events are held throughout the year to allow students to unwind and have fun with their friends.

Concentrated Academic Support

Besides classes, IHSM students are encouraged to engage in other academic activities to foster their knowledge and interest in medicine as well as other personal pursuits.

International Student Aid

Resources such as language support services and cultural orientation programs are provided by IHSM to assist international students acclimatize to living in Kyrgyzstan and work towards fully utilizing their stay in the university.

In summary, at IHSM, students get the chance to develop academically, socially, and personally, which is the essence of an expanded life.

Ranking of International Higher School of Medicine (IHSM), Kyrgyzstan

The International Higher School of Medicine (IHSM) stands within the positional ranking of the world which is both respected nationally and internationally.

Country Ranking : Similarly IHSM comes in 27 among all schools in Kyrgyzstan.

World Ranking : The institution comes in 11868 according to UniRank’s classification.

Although the university is not in the global top rankings, it stands out because of its low fees and great medical education, making it an attractive choice for medical students.

Advantages of Studying At International Higher School of Medicine (IHSM), Kyrgyzstan

Before diving into the International Higher School of Medicine (IHSM), let us take a look at its most salient features.

Pathway to a Successful Career

One of the core values at IHSM is ensuring that every graduate excels in his or her chosen career, this is evident from doctors practicing across the globe.

Affordable Tuition Fees

For most students, especially those on a budget, it is low as compared to several other medical schools.

Globally Recognized Education

Your degree will be respected throughout the world as IHSM is well recognized by international medical bodies such as WHO.

Hands-on Clinical Exposure

Rotational internships provide students with core practical skills, consolidating their theoretical knowledge.

Diverse and Supportive Community

More than 50 countries are represented at IHSM, which provides a rich and supportive environment for cross-cultural learning.

Modern Facilities

Students are well catered for with comfortable hostels and high speed internet that supports both academic study and social interaction.

Given all the aforementioned points, students can understand why pursuing a medical degree with IHSM is both affordable and much sought after.

Placement At International Higher School of Medicine (IHSM), Kyrgyzstan

International Higher School of Medicine (IHSM) puts great emphasis on providing placement opportunities for its graduates. Medical program completers can pursue the following career pathways:

Employment as Physicians

Medical doctors’ graduates are free to practice medicine in various hospitals, clinics, and healthcare institutions globally, including India.

Further Studies Possibilities

IHSM actively promotes students after graduation from its programs to further their education through pursuing a specialization or post-graduate degree.

Opportunities Within India

Indian graduates are allowed to practice in India as a medical doctor after completing their MBBS degree and meeting the licensing conditions, like the Foreign Medical Graduate Exam (FMGE).

IHSM facilitates the starting point in the desired career of the graduate and provides the opportunity for further training and specialization.

Education Loan for Indian Students

Students from India who wish to enroll at the International Higher School of Medicine (IHSM) can obtain loans to support their education overseas. The following are recommended for consideration:

Eligibility to Apply for a Loan

Bank NEET Score Criteria: High NEET scores are compulsory for banks to work with you.

Academic Offer Letter: The invitation letter from IHSM.

Financial Capability of Parents: Chances are your parents’ income and their assets will determine how much you can borrow.

Financial Assistance

The loan can cater for tuition fees, housing, travel, and other allowance.

Acceptable Documents

NEET Certification

University Acceptance Letter

Evidence of Parents’ Income (P60, pay advices, bank statements etc.)

Property Documents (where appropriate)

Primary Provider of Loan

Atlas Mentor offers guidance and support to obtain a loan for pursuing medicine abroad.

These loans greatly alleviate the financial burden of medical students studying in foreign countries.

FAQs On International Higher School of Medicine (IHSM), Kyrgyzstan

Here are some commonly asked questions (FAQs) about the International Higher School of Medicine (IHSM):

Is IHSM recognized by international medical organizations?

 Yes, IHSM is recognized by the World Health Organization (WHO) and the Educational Commission for Foreign Medical Graduates (ECFMG), ensuring that your medical degree is accepted worldwide.

What is the duration of the MBBS program at IHSM?

The MBBS program at IHSM is a 6-year course, which includes both academic studies and hands-on clinical experience.

What are the tuition fees for studying at IHSM?

The tuition fees for each year of study at IHSM are $5,000, and the total fee for the 6-year MBBS program is approximately $30,000.

Is there an age limit for admission?

Yes, applicants must be at least 17 years old on or before December 31st of the year they are applying.

Are there hostels available for students?

Yes, IHSM offers well-equipped hostels with amenities like high-speed Wi-Fi, laundry services, and 24/7 security, making it a comfortable place for students to live during their studies.

These FAQs provide a quick overview of the key details about studying at IHSM.
